title: Oura’s next smart ring could come in a new color — but also drop a familiar option
summary: Rose Gold is out, Deep Rose is in.
body: TL;DR Renders of what could be the Oura Ring 5 have surfaced online. The new generation will reportedly drop Oura’s Rose Gold colorway for a new Deep Rose option. The Oura Ring 5 likely won’t be released this year. Images of what appear to be Oura’s next smart ring have appeared online. Official-looking renders of the purported Oura Ring 5 show a similar wearable to the company’s last smart ring, but with a different sensor layout and a lovely new colorway. Android Headlines published the renders this morning, attributing them to an unnamed source. We can’t tell much about the new version from these images, though we can see a new coppery color that the report says will be called Deep Rose.
